title: Notification of new post every 5 minutes until assigned
excerpt: I’m looking for a feature that will notify users of unassigned posts every X minutes.  So if we have a new post and it goes unassigned for X minutes, send a notification to all.  X minutes later and still not assigned, s…

posts.author: dwolfe (Dave Wolfe)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m looking for a feature that will notify users of unassigned posts every X minutes. So if we have a new post and it goes unassigned for X minutes, send a notification to all. X minutes later and still not assigned, send a notification, etc.
